home.heroSub: Deep conversations with innovators from industry, academia, and startups — exploring what innovation really means in practice.
home.trusted: Trusted by Liebherr, Eaton, Teleflex & more
home.aboutBody1: Hello, my name is Martin Pattera. I am the managing partner of MYLES Strategy & Innovation GmbH. I have an MBA from the Vienna University of Economics and Business and have been involved in innovation and growth for over twenty years.
home.aboutBody2: I love learning and understanding contexts. Innovation requires a creative heart as well as a cool head. When the two work together, a lot of energy is released. That's what I live for.
home.aboutBody3: Before joining MYLES, I built up Edizon Innovation GmbH as a leading innovation consultancy in Europe. I held key positions at Roland Berger Strategy Consultants and Mayr-Melnhof Karton, with expertise across medical technology, IT, mechanical engineering, mobility, construction, and consumer goods.
home.latestSub: New conversations with innovators — every month.
home.keynoteTeaserBody: Martin brings two decades of hands-on innovation experience to every stage. His talks are practical, research-backed, and built to inspire action.
home.teaserCard1Body: Methodology-based growth strategy that outperforms traditional approaches 5×.
home.teaserCard2Body: Understanding what customers truly hire your product to do.
home.teaserCard3Body: Building bridges between technology and business value.
home.teaserCard4Body: Navigating the intersection of innovation and AI.
home.ctaSub: Book Martin as a keynote speaker or apply as a podcast guest.

podcast.heroSub: Martin talks to innovators from various industries about their personal 'state of innovation'. What are the key topics? What has changed? What comes next?
podcast.noResults: No episodes found for your search.

keynote.heroTitle: Innovation as a methodology, not a miracle.
keynote.heroSub: Martin Pattera delivers keynotes that inspire action and provide concrete frameworks — built on 20+ years of hands-on innovation work with global enterprises.
keynote.topic1Body: A rigorous methodology for growth that puts customer outcomes at the centre of every decision.
keynote.topic2Body: How leading companies use JTBD to build products customers actually want — with real-world case studies.
keynote.topic3Body: How the PM role is evolving and what it takes to build great products in an AI-driven world.
keynote.topic4Body: Navigating the intersection of innovation, technology, and organisational change.
keynote.t1Quote: Martin has a unique ability to make complex innovation concepts accessible and immediately actionable. Our team left with a clear framework — not just inspiration.
keynote.t2Quote: The JTBD framework Martin presented transformed how our team thinks about product development. We started applying it the very next day.
keynote.teaching1: Vienna University of Economics and Business
keynote.teaching2: University of Applied Sciences — Austrian Marketing University
keynote.teaching4: DTU Executive School of Business (Prof. Sören Salomo)
keynote.teaching7: Best Practice Classes at Fortune 500 companies (2-day)
keynote.teaching8: PFI events in Austria and Germany

booking.heroSub: Book Martin as a keynote speaker for your event, or apply to be a guest on The State of Innovation podcast.
booking.speakerSub: Fill out the form below and Martin's team will get back to you within 2 business days.
booking.guestSub: Think you'd be a great fit for the podcast? Tell us about yourself.
booking.fieldMessagePlaceholder: Tell us about your event, the audience, and what you hope to achieve…
booking.fieldTopicPlaceholder: What would you like to talk about? What's your unique angle on innovation?
booking.fieldAudiencePlaceholder: Describe the listeners this episode would resonate with most.
booking.successMsg: Thanks! We'll be in touch soon.

footer.tagline: Innovation is not chance — it's a method.
